hero.title: The World Cup is live. Beat your friends.
hero.subtitle: Predict every match, spin up competitions with friends, and climb the leaderboards — all for free.

demo.title: See how scoring works
demo.subtitle: Predict a score and watch the points add up — no account needed. Exact scores are worth most, the right result still scores.

waysToPlay.title: Three ways to play
waysToPlay.subtitle: Score across the whole tournament — pick matches now, with your bracket and award predictions set before kickoff.

match.title: Match Picks
match.desc: Predict the exact scoreline of every match.

bracket.title: Bracket Pick'em
bracket.desc: Call who tops each group and advances all the way to the final.

awards.title: Awards
awards.desc: Pick the Golden Boot, Golden Ball, Golden Glove and Young Player.

stats.title: The biggest World Cup ever
stats.subtitle: 48 teams across North America — there's a pick for every match.

social.title: Players around the world are in
social.subtitle: See who the world is backing to lift the trophy.

finalCta.title: Ready to play?
finalCta.subtitle: It takes a minute to sign up and you're in for the rest of the tournament.

featured.guestHint: Join to predict this match and earn points

banner.group: The group stage is rolling — new fixtures open for picks as each kickoff approaches.
banner.knockout: Knockouts are here — every match is win or go home.
banner.guest: The World Cup is live — create your account and start predicting.

progress.title: Your picks
progress.subtitle: Track your progress across all three games.
progress.guestSubtitle: Predict matches and earn points across three categories.

bracket.title: Bracket Pick'em
bracket.blurb: Groups, best thirds, and the full knockout bracket.

awards.title: Awards
awards.blurb: Golden Boot, Best Player, and more.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.joinBoardSub: Enter a join code from a friend
